title: Kuih Bahulu
description: a traditional Malay egg-based sponge cake, often described as an Asian madeleine, characterized by a crisp, golden-brown exterior and a soft, airy interior.

title: Sotong Goreng
description: a popular Southeast Asian dish of deep-fried squid, featuring a crispy, savory batter—often seasoned with turmeric or curry powder—encasing tender, succulent, and slightly sweet calamari rings.

title: Udang Goreng
description: a popular Southeast Asian dish of fried prawns, ranging from simple stir-fried or deep-fried prawns to battered and spicy variations.
